welcome.title: We want to hear from you
welcome.intro1: La Neta is a creator-first company that partners with platforms like YouTube, TikTok, Instagram and Pinterest to help content creators grow faster, reach global audiences, and build real businesses. We work with over 50,000 creators across the Americas.
welcome.intro2: We're building new services designed specifically for creators like you, and we want to get it right.
welcome.intro3: This quick survey takes about 3 minutes. Your answers are confidential and will directly shape what we build.
welcome.gift: 🎁 Complete this survey and you'll be among the first to receive these services FREE or at a heavy discount when we launch.

q3.text: What platforms do you create on?

q5.text: Hours per week on tasks OTHER than main content creation?
q5.hint: Editing, thumbnails, social posts, DMs, SEO, emails, etc.

q6.text: Which of these do you currently do yourself?
q6.cut_clips: I cut clips/shorts from my content
q6.design_thumbnails: I design my own thumbnails or covers
q6.optimize_seo: I optimize titles, descriptions, tags or hashtags
q6.translate_content: I translate or dub my content
q6.manage_schedule: I manage my posting schedule across platforms

s2.intro: Below are 13 services we may offer. For each, tell us if you're interested and how much you'd pay (USD).

q8.text: Would you prefer services individually or as a bundle?
q8.bundle: Bundle — one price, easier to manage
q8.individual: Individual — I only want specific services
q8.depends: Depends on how much the bundle saves

q9.text: What's the TOTAL monthly amount you'd invest in growing your content and brand?
q9.hint: Including any tools, services, or help you already pay for or would consider.

q10.text: What's the #1 thing you wish you had help with right now?
q10.placeholder: Whatever comes to mind — 2 or 3 lines is enough...

q11.text: Can we contact you for updates and early access at launch?

thanks.title: Thanks!
thanks.body: Your answers are saved. Every response helps us build better tools for creators like you.
thanks.gift: 🎁 You're now on the early access list. You'll be among the first to try these services free or at a discount when we launch.
thanks.closingLine: We appreciate you. Keep creating — we'll handle the rest.
thanks.shareTitle: Know another creator who should take this?

errors.wishShort: Tell us a bit more (minimum 3 characters)
errors.submitNetwork: We couldn't save your response. Your progress is safe.
errors.submitServer: Something failed on our side. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.submitRateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in 1 hour.

short_clips.name: Short-form clips
short_clips.description: We turn your content into ready-to-post clips for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Captions, formatting, and branding included. You just post.

thumbnail_design.name: Thumbnail + cover design
thumbnail_design.description: Professional thumbnails or cover images with 2-3 variants to test which gets the most clicks. Plus optimized titles using search data for your niche.

ai_dubbing.name: AI dubbing / translation
ai_dubbing.description: We dub your videos into other languages using AI that sounds exactly like you. Or translate your captions and text overlays for multilingual posts.

content_seo.name: Content SEO + hashtags
content_seo.description: We optimize every post and video for discovery: keywords, hashtags, descriptions, tags. Plus we fix your old content that's invisible in search.

performance_dashboard.name: Weekly performance dashboard
performance_dashboard.description: A visual weekly report showing what's working, what's not, and 3-5 specific things to do next week to grow faster.

media_kit.name: Dynamic media kit
media_kit.description: An always-updated media kit with your real stats. Send brands one link. Always current, no outdated PDFs. Updates itself automatically.

ai_coach.name: ELEVN AI Coach
ai_coach.description: An AI assistant trained on YOUR data. Ask it anything: next content ideas, why something underperformed, best posting times. Personalized answers 24/7.

we_post_for_you.name: We post for you
we_post_for_you.description: We don't just create your content. We post it on all your social media accounts at the best times with the right hashtags. Your social runs on complete autopilot.

paid_community.name: Paid community (managed for you)
paid_community.description: We build and run a paid community for your biggest fans: daily posts, member onboarding, moderation, and growth. You show up 30 min/week for a live session.

newsletter.name: Newsletter (written + sent for you)
newsletter.description: We write and send a weekly email newsletter from your content. You give us bullet points or a voice memo. We make it professional and send it to your list.

online_course.name: Online course (built for you)
online_course.description: We build a complete course from your expertise: curriculum, sales page, checkout, launch emails. You record the video lessons. The course sells on autopilot.

podcast.name: Podcast (from your existing content)
podcast.description: We turn your existing videos into a professional podcast. You record nothing extra. We handle audio cleanup, show notes, and distribution to Spotify and Apple.

merch_store.name: Merch store (designed + managed)
merch_store.description: We design branded merchandise and build your online store. A partner handles manufacturing, printing, and shipping. Zero inventory for you. You just promote.

starter.name: Clips + thumbnails + monthly report
starter.includes: Short-form clips, thumbnail/cover design, monthly performance report.

growth.name: Starter + dubbing + SEO + AI Coach
growth.includes: Everything in Starter plus AI dubbing/translation, content SEO and ELEVN AI Coach.

pro.name: Growth + dashboard + media kit + posting + strategy
pro.includes: Everything in Growth plus weekly dashboard, dynamic media kit, 'we post for you', and 30-min monthly strategy call.
pro.tagItems: + dashboard + media kit + autopost + strategy call

legal.title: Terms & Privacy

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.p1: Participation in this survey is voluntary. By submitting your answers you confirm that the information you provide is true to the best of your knowledge and that you are at least 18 years old.
terms.p2: La Neta may use aggregated and anonymized survey results to design new services, set pricing, and publish insights about the creator economy. Individual responses are not published without consent.
terms.p3: The early-access incentive is a best-effort offer. If we launch the services you selected, we will reach out to you first with a free or discounted access window, subject to availability.

privacy.heading: Privacy Notice
privacy.p1: Data we collect: your name, social handle, platforms you create on, follower range, weekly hours spent on non-content tasks, services you currently handle yourself, your interest and willingness to pay for each service, your #1 wish, your monthly budget range, and — only if you opt in on question 11 — your WhatsApp phone number and an optional backup email.
privacy.p2: Why we collect it: to design services and pricing that match real creator needs, to contact you when we launch (only if you opted in), and to analyze trends across our respondent base.
privacy.p3: Where it lives: responses are stored in a Supabase (Postgres) database hosted in the United States. If the primary store is unreachable, a backup copy may be written to a Google Sheet that only La Neta team members can read.
privacy.p4: How long we keep it: survey responses are retained for up to 24 months for research. Contact details (phone / email) are retained until 6 months after launch or until you request deletion, whichever comes first.
privacy.p5: Your rights: you can request a copy, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties outside of the service providers that help us store it.

legal.contactLine: Questions or requests? Email us at
